title: Founding Engineer
description:
Built and owned full-stack and AI product work in a founding-stage environment, taking features from early product discussions through implementation, testing, and deployment. Operate as a self-directed product engineer focused on building reliable, production-oriented agentic systems.
- Product Engineering: Independently conceptualized and delivered high-impact platform features, owning the full development cycle from direct user and customer conversations to deploying production-ready code.
- Performance & System Hardening: Led critical initiatives to optimize system responsiveness and resource efficiency, including a 90%+ reduction in core latency and meaningful improvements in backend stability.
- Infrastructure & Operations: Established internal engineering standards by building automated deployment pipelines, comprehensive testing frameworks, and monitoring tools to support high-velocity, reliable releases.
- Forward-Deployed Engineering: Partner directly with users and customer-facing teammates to diagnose operational bottlenecks, moving from initial discovery to deployed technical solutions within rapid iteration cycles.
- Core Technologies: Python (FastAPI), TypeScript (Next.js/React), PostgreSQL, Docker, and Cloud Infrastructure (GCP).

title: Data Engineer, Full Stack Developer
description:
Applied AI Research & Prototype Engineering for an enterprise AI platform. Focused on rigorous evaluation methodology, agentic system prototypes, and high-fidelity data pipelines for internal research and customer-facing demonstrations.
- AI Evaluation & Benchmarking: Designed and executed comparative retrieval evaluations using peer-reviewed methodology (ARES, NAACL 2024) on the KILT benchmark corpus; conducted function-calling performance assessments using the Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard (BFCL).
- Agent System Prototypes: Architected and built a multi-agent orchestration platform featuring planner-executor decoupling, dynamic agent discovery, and tiered query routing to explore advanced agentic capabilities.
- Technical Evaluation: Analyzed tool-calling and RAG workflows across latency, accuracy, and token usage to provide data-driven insights for inference-cost and architectural decisions.
- Data Strategy: Engineered pipelines to transform unstructured input into structured, model-ready formats, unblocking downstream research and evaluation cycles.
- Core Technologies: Python, LangGraph, sentence-transformers, FAISS, BM25, and OpenAI.

title: AI Engineer & Product Consultant
description:
Worked on AI-powered product development for a consumer surf forecasting platform through its iOS and Android launch. Focused on assistant quality, observability, and translating user-domain needs into technical implementation for a conversational AI interface.
- Observability & Reliability: Engineered an end-to-end tracing pipeline using LangSmith (Python / Google Gemini / GCP) to monitor model behavior, troubleshoot pipeline failures, and provide the team with visibility into inference costs and latency.
- R&D & Quality Assurance: Designed and executed experiments across prompts and retrieval strategies to improve assistant response quality and grounding in real-time data.
- Product Strategy: Contributed surfer-domain expertise to product design and feature discussions, informing technical decisions to align with the needs of the core user base.

title: Teaching Assistant
description:
Served as a Teaching Assistant for Artificial Intelligence and Information Systems courses, supporting 150+ students through technical mentorship and course operations.
- AI Technical Instruction: Mentored students on AI fundamentals for CSE 140, covering machine learning, search algorithms, and neural methods.
- Systems & Methodology: Led discussions on SQL, Relational Databases, and Agile/Scrum, bridging the gap between technical implementation and business requirements.
- Engineering Operations: Managed technical course infrastructure, including autograders and assessment workflows, for large-scale student cohorts.

title: Full Stack Developer & Product Consultant
description:
Full-stack product engineering for a mobile marketplace app. Operated as one of two developers alongside the co-founder to take features from initial product discussion through production iOS releases, helping scale the platform to 20,000+ users.
- Mobile Product Development: Built consumer-facing features end-to-end in Flutter and Firebase, including user-defined custom alerts with optimized push delivery, chat architecture enhancements, and dynamic content widgets.
- AI-Powered Internal Tooling: Engineered a custom GPT workflow integrated with the Google Sheets API to generate outreach and marketing content for the summer intern team, standardizing messaging and accelerating content production.
- Core Technologies: Flutter, Firebase (Firestore, Cloud Messaging), OpenAI API, and iOS Deployment.
